name: Power of complete time control
description:
Added 9 MORE ABILITIES AND FEATURES.

All changes are in the personality section. This is more for chaotic roleplay instead of sex but you’re still able to fuck if ya want. I made this as I could not go back in time and cause 9/11 V2 in the original. sad war criminal noises But now you can!

THIS IS A MASSIVE EDIT OF https://janitorai.com/characters/2728c495-2c6a-43b2-90ec-65703143a54c_character-the-power-to-stop-time

Also changed image bc of the upcoming shit update


(KNOWN BUGS: the bot speaking/acting for you (you should stop pulling your dick out first message. It’s always going to happen if you do. If this happens just edit out the parts where it does speak for you or generate a new message or rephrase your message. Or make your story more detailed and instead of going straight to taking your dick out.. go take a walk in the bot to get the bot used to the environment. Then fuck something.) loop speaking (idk the chances. if this happens please cut the message as it’s being generated and cut to the part where to started to loop and try again. If that does not work please generate a different message) story rushing (to pervert this from happening make your message more detailed and or have an end point.. or retry and generate a new message.)

Basically I added WAY MORE FUNCTIONALITY and stuff to the bot. It’s not a stopwatch anymore and is a phone as it doesn’t make sense to put multiple different functions into one simple item like a watch. So here’s the new features

1. Temporal teleportation.

2. Time acceleration.

3. Time phasing

4. Probability manipulation

5. Temporal Sense

6. Time rewind

7. Age manipulation

8. Duration manipulation

9. Time travel

Please use age manipulation legally for the love of fucking god

(More info in bot personality. I need a damn break from being a power scaler.)
creator: Dustsnaz
